inst✝⁶ : @HeightOneLocalizationIsPID A inst✝⁸
M : Type u_2

inst✝⁴ : Module A M
inst✝³ : Module.Finite A M
hMT : IsTorsion A M
N : Type u_3
inst✝² : AddCommGroup N
inst✝¹ : Module A N
inst✝ : Module.Finite A N
hNT : IsTorsion A N
⊢ M ∼ₚᵢₛ[A] N ↔
    ∀ (p : PrimeSpectrum A),
      p.asIdeal.primeHeight = 1 →
        Nonempty
          (LocalizedModule p.asIdeal.primeCompl M ≃ₗ[Localization p.asIdeal.primeCompl]
            LocalizedModule p.asIdeal.primeCompl N)

constructor
  · rintro ⟨f, hf⟩ p hp
    let sigma := (Module.support A M ∪ Module.support A N) ∩ {p | p.1.primeHeight = 1}
    let S := ⨅ q ∈ sigma, q.1.primeCompl
    have hfS := (LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT hNT f).mp hf
    by_cases hps : p ∈ sigma
    · let fS := LocalizedModule.map S f
      let eS := LinearEquiv.ofBijective fS hfS
      exact ⟨eS.localizedModuleLinearEquiv p.1.primeCompl (Submonoid.le_iInf_iff.mp le_rfl p hps)⟩
    · have hM : Subsingleton (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M) := by
        rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff, ← Module.notMem_support_iff, Module.mem_support_iff_of_finite]
        intro h; apply hps; exact ⟨Or.inl h, hp⟩
      have hN : Subsingleton (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N) := by
        rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff, ← Module.notMem_support_iff, Module.mem_support_iff_of_finite]
        intro h; apply hps; exact ⟨Or.inr h, hp⟩
      exact ⟨(subsingleton_equiv_subsingleton hM hN).toLinearEquiv⟩
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨ιM, _, pM, hpM, eM, _, hM⟩ := hMT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    obtain ⟨ιN, _, pN, hpN, eN, _, hN⟩ := hNT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    have hMN : ((i : ιM) → A ⧸ (pM i).1 ^ (eM i)) ≃ₗ[A] ((j : ιN) → A ⧸ (pN j).1 ^ (eN j)) :=
      linearEquiv_of_localizedModule_linearEquiv_at_height_one hpM hpN (fun p hp ↦
        (hM.localizedModule_linearEquiv p hp).symm.trans ((h p hp).some.trans (hN.localizedModule_linearEquiv p hp)))
    exact hM.trans (hMN.isPseudoIsomorphism.trans hN.symm)

obtain ⟨ιM, _, pM, h1M, eM, -, hM⟩ := hMT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
  obtain ⟨ιN, _, pN, h1N, eN, -, hN⟩ := hNT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi

refine ⟨fun ⟨f, hf⟩ p hp ↦ ⟨(LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT hNT f).mp hf p hp⟩, fun h ↦ ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨ιM, _, pM, hpM, eM, _, hM⟩ := hMT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
  obtain ⟨ιN, _, pN, hpN, eN, _, hN⟩ := hNT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
  set M' := (i : ιM) → A ⧸ (pM i).1 ^ eM i
  set N' := (i : ιN) → A ⧸ (pN i).1 ^ eN i
  have hM' : IsTorsion A M' := Module.isTorsion_pi (fun i ↦ Ideal.Quotient.isTorsion_quotient_power_le_one (hpM i))
  have hN' : IsTorsion A N' := Module.isTorsion_pi (fun i ↦ Ideal.Quotient.isTorsion_quotient_power_le_one (hpN i))
  obtain ⟨fM, hfM⟩ := hM
  obtain ⟨fN, hfN⟩ := hN
  have h_iso_p : ∀ p, p.1.primeHeight = 1 → Nonempty (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M' ≃ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl] LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N') := by
    intro p hp
    exact ⟨((LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT hM' fM).mp hfM p hp).symm.trans
      ((h p hp).some.trans ((LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hNT hN' fN).mp hfN p hp))⟩
  have : M' ≃ₗ[A] N' := linearEquiv_of_localized_isomorphic_height_one_pi pM hpM eM pN hpN eN h_iso_p
  exact hM.trans ((IsPseudoIsomorphic.of_linearEquiv this).trans hN.symm)

constructor
  · intro h p hp
    induction h with
    | rel f hf =>
      rw [isPseudoIsomorphism_iff, Module.isPseudoNull_iff_primeHeight_le_one_imp_subsingleton] at hf
      exact ⟨(LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl f).linearEquivOfBijective ⟨
        (LinearMap.subsingleton_ker_convert f _).mp (hf p (le_of_eq hp)),
        (LinearMap.subsingleton_coker_convert f _).mp (hf p (le_of_eq hp))⟩⟩
    | refl => exact ⟨.refl _ _⟩
    | symm _ ih => exact ⟨ih.some.symm⟩
    | trans _ _ ih1 ih2 => exact ⟨ih1.some.trans ih2.some⟩
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨_, _, _, _, _, _, hM⟩ := hMT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    obtain ⟨_, _, _, _, _, _, hN⟩ := hNT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    exact hM.trans (hN.symm.trans (sorry))

constructor
  · rintro ⟨f, hf⟩ p hp
    rw [isPseudoIsomorphism_iff, Module.isPseudoNull_iff_primeHeight_le_one_imp_subsingleton] at hf
    exact ⟨LinearEquiv.ofBijective (LocalizedModule.map p.asIdeal.primeCompl f)
      ⟨(LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff_ker_eq_bot _).mp (hf.1 p (le_of_eq hp)),
       (LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff_range_eq_top _).mp (hf.2 p (le_of_eq hp))⟩⟩
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨ι, _, p, hp, e, _, hM⟩ := hMT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    obtain ⟨κ, _, q, hq, f, _, hN⟩ := hNT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    refine hM.trans (hN.symm.trans ?_)
    let M' := (i : ι) → A ⧸ (p i).asIdeal ^ (e i)
    let N' := (i : κ) → A ⧸ (q i).asIdeal ^ (f i)
    have h' (p₀ : PrimeSpectrum A) (hp₀ : p₀.asIdeal.primeHeight = 1) :
      Nonempty (LocalizedModule p₀.asIdeal.primeCompl M' ≃ₗ[Localization p₀.asIdeal.primeCompl]
        LocalizedModule p₀.asIdeal.primeCompl N') := by
      obtain ⟨e1⟩ := (isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_nonempty_linearEquiv_localizedModule hMT (Module.IsTorsion.pi (fun i => Module.IsTorsion.quotient_power_height_one (hp i)))).1 hM p₀ hp₀
      obtain ⟨e2⟩ := (isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_nonempty_linearEquiv_localizedModule hNT (Module.IsTorsion.pi (fun i => Module.IsTorsion.quotient_power_height_one (hq i)))).1 hN p₀ hp₀
      exact ⟨e1.symm.trans ((h p₀ hp₀).some.trans e2)⟩
    set sigma := (Module.support A M' ∪ Module.support A N') ∩ {p | p.asIdeal.primeHeight = 1}
    set S := ⨅ p ∈ sigma, p.asIdeal.primeCompl
    have hS : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization sigma (by simp) (by
      rcases (Module.support A M').eq_empty_or_nonempty with hM' | hM'
      · rcases (Module.support A N').eq_empty_or_nonempty with hN' | hN'
        · simp [hM', hN', sigma]
        · obtain ⟨p, hp⟩ := hN'; use p; simp [sigma, hp, hq]
      · obtain ⟨p, hp⟩ := hM'; use p; simp [sigma, hp, hp]) (by
      refine Set.Finite.inter (Set.Finite.union ?_ ?_) (by simp)
      all_goals apply Module.IsTorsion.finite_primeHeight_one_support; (apply Module.IsTorsion.pi; intro; apply Module.IsTorsion.quotient_power_height_one; simp [*]))).2
    have : Nonempty (LocalizedModule S M' ≃ₗ[Localization S] LocalizedModule S N') :=
      IsPrincipalIdealRing.isomorphism_of_localized_isomorphism_maximal (Localization S) h'
    obtain ⟨e_iso⟩ := this
    obtain ⟨f_map, s, hf_map⟩ := IsLocalization.linearMap_localization S M' N' e_iso
    exact ⟨f_map, (LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map (Module.IsTorsion.pi (fun i => Module.IsTorsion.quotient_power_height_one (hp i))) (Module.IsTorsion.pi (fun i => Module.IsTorsion.quotient_power_height_one (hq i))) f_map).mpr (by
      rw [hf_map, LocalizedModule.map_smul]; exact (e_iso.symm.trans (LinearEquiv.smul s (IsLocalization.unit_of_mem_nonZeroDivisors (Localization S) S (S.iInf_le_of_le (sigma.choose_spec.1) (sigma.choose_spec.2)) (sigma.choose.asIdeal.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors s.prop)))).bijective)⟩

refine ⟨fun h p hp ↦ h.localizedModule_linearEquiv hp, fun h ↦ ?_⟩

refine ⟨fun ⟨f, hf⟩ p hp ↦ ⟨(LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT hNT f).mp hf p hp⟩, fun h ↦ ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨ι, _, pM, hpM, eM, heM, hM⟩ := hMT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
  obtain ⟨κ, _, pN, hpN, eN, heN, hN⟩ := hNT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
  have : ((i : ι) → A ⧸ (pM i).1 ^ (eM i)) ≃ₗ[A] ((j : κ) → A ⧸ (pN j).1 ^ (eN j)) := by
    apply Module.IsTorsion.linearEquiv_of_localized_linearEquiv (pM := pM) (pN := pN)
    intro p hp
    specialize h p hp
    have hM_loc := (LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT ?_ hM.some).mp hM.some_spec p hp
    have hN_loc := (LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hNT ?_ hN.some).mp hN.some_spec p hp
    exact ⟨hM_loc.symm.trans (h.some.trans hN_loc)⟩
    all_goals infer_instance
  exact hM.trans (this.isPseudoIsomorphic.trans hN.symm)

rw [isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_charIdeal_eq hMT hNT,
    charIdeal_eq_iff_localizedModule_isomorphic_all_primeHeight_one hMT hNT]

constructor
  · intro h p hp
    exact h.localizedModule_equiv p hp
  · intro h
    rw [isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_characteristicIdeal_eq hMT hNT]
    exact characteristicIdeal_eq_of_forall_localizedModule_equiv h

constructor
  · rintro ⟨f, hf⟩ p hp
    exact ⟨LinearEquiv.ofBijective _ ((LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT hNT f).1 hf p hp)⟩
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨ι, _, p, hp, e, _, hM⟩ := hMT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    obtain ⟨κ, _, q, hq, f, _, hN⟩ := hNT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    refine hM.trans (hN.symm.isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_right.mpr ?_)
    exact nonempty_linearEquiv_of_localizedModule_isomorphic hp hq h
rw [isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_characteristicIdeal_eq, characteristicIdeal_eq_iff_nonempty_linearEquiv_localizedModule]

refine ⟨fun h p hp ↦ ?_, fun h ↦ ?_⟩
  · obtain ⟨L, _, f, g, hf, hg⟩ := h
    have hLT : Module.IsTorsion A L := by
      rw [Module.isTorsion_iff_support_ne_top]
      intro hSupp; apply (Module.isTorsion_iff_support_ne_top A M).1 hMT
      rw [hSupp]; exact (Module.support_subset_of_surjective f.range.mkQ (Submodule.mkQ_surjective _)).antisymm (Set.subset_univ _)
    exact ⟨(LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl f).linearEquivOfBijective
      ((LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hLT hMT f).1 hf p hp) |>.symm.trans
      ((LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl g).linearEquivOfBijective
      ((LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hLT hNT g).1 hg p hp))⟩
  · obtain ⟨ιM, _, pM, h1M, eM, _, hM⟩ := hMT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    obtain ⟨ιN, _, pN, h1N, eN, _, hN⟩ := hNT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    have hM_p p hp := (Module.IsTorsion.isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_nonempty_linearEquiv_localizedModule hMT
      (Module.IsTorsion.pi (fun i ↦ (pM i).1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors.isTorsion_quotient_power (eM i)))).1 hM p hp
    have hN_p p hp := (Module.IsTorsion.isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_nonempty_linearEquiv_localizedModule hNT
      (Module.IsTorsion.pi (fun i ↦ (pN i).1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors.isTorsion_quotient_power (eN i)))).1 hN p hp
    refine hM.trans (PseudoIsomorphic.trans (PseudoIsomorphic.of_linearEquiv ?_) hN.symm)
    apply LinearEquiv.of_forall_localizedModule_at_prime_height_one_nonempty
    intro p hp; exact (hM_p p hp).symm.trans ((h p hp).trans (hN_p p hp))

constructor
  · rintro ⟨f, hf⟩ p hp
    exact ⟨(LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl f).linearEquivOfIsPseudoIsomorphism hp hf⟩
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨ιM, _, pM, hpM, eM, _, hM⟩ := hMT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    obtain ⟨ιN, _, pN, hpN, eN, _, hN⟩ := hNT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
    exact hM.trans (hN.symm.trans (isPseudoIsomorphic_pi_equiv_pi_of_localizedModule_equiv hpM hpN h))

refine ⟨fun h p hp ↦ h.localizedModule_equiv p hp.le, fun h ↦ ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨_, _, _, _, _, _, hM⟩ := hMT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
  obtain ⟨_, _, _, _, _, _, hN⟩ := hNT.isPseudoIsomorphic_pi
  exact hM.trans (hN.symm.trans (IsPseudoIsomorphic.of_equiv (linearEquiv_of_localizedModule_equiv h hM hN)))
